message:
test(fuzz): grow jsonl_import corpus by 102 discovered inputs

Libfuzzer surfaced these inputs during recent runs of the jsonl_import
target. Committing the full set so future runs start from the expanded
coverage frontier and so regressions can be replayed deterministically
in CI.

All entries are small (< 1 KB each) and live under
`fuzz/corpus/jsonl_import/` — the same directory prior corpus growth
commits (763d302, 1aa1740) have been landing into. No code changes.
